headlines.description: — Ironhead would've been proud of his boys.
headlines.shortLinkText: Heyward brothers lead Steelers to 19-16 win over Falcons

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers figured the Green Bay Packers were in a good spot and would find a way to pull out the win. Given his history against the Chicago Bears, it wasn't exactly a big leap of faith.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers, Packers rally in 4th quarter to beat Bears 28-19

headlines.description: — The Detroit Lions were so dominant on offense that they didn't punt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Goff's 340 yards and 2 TDs help Lions rout Jaguars 40-14

events.name: New York Jets at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — In the tension of these habitually tight finishes, the Minnesota Vikings have become quite the confident and comfortable team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings hang on, again, for 27-22 victory over White, Jets

events.name: Washington Commanders at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Walking off the field after a 20-all tie was a novel experience for most of the Washington Commanders and New York Giants. None of them seemed to like it.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants, Commanders flummoxed by tie amid playoff chase

headlines.description: — A.J Brown pulled out a towel and wagged his finger at the goal post before he swatted the structure three times. The hard feelings didn't last. Brown hugged the goal post and let bygones by bygones.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts has 3 TD passes plus TD run, Eagles beat Titans 35-10

headlines.description: — All Tyler Huntley and the Baltimore Ravens needed was one great drive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Huntley rallies Ravens past Broncos after Jackson injured

headlines.description: — Deshaun Watson didn't play well Sunday in his return after sitting out almost two years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Watson rusty in return but Browns get 27-14 win over Texans

events.name: Seattle Seahawks at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Whenever Geno Smith looked across the line in the final minutes at SoFi Stadium, he saw an inspired Bobby Wagner leading an entire Los Angeles Rams team desperately in need of a victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Geno Smith hits Metcalf for late TD, Seahawks top Rams 27-23

headlines.description: — The Miami Dolphins hit San Francisco's vaunted defense with a 75-yard haymaker on the opening play and then watched 49ers quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo leave with a <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Purdy, defense lead 49ers past Fins; Garoppolo breaks foot

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow got a huge assist from his defense in another riveting duel with Patrick Mahomes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow tops Mahomes again, rallies Bengals past Chiefs 27-24

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — The last time the Raiders played at home, they lost to an Indianapolis Colts team playing for an interim coach and Las Vegas quarterback <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Carr-Adams connection rallies Raiders past Chargers 27-20

headlines.description: — Dallas safety Malik Hooker had no idea what he was starting with a fumble return for a touchdown early in the fourth quarter against his former team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys score 33 points in 4th quarter, rout Colts 54-19
